name: malformed-json
description: LLM returned JSON-ish text with a trailing comma and unclosed brace.

name: truncated
description: LLM hit the output token limit mid-string.

name: markdown-wrapped
description: LLM wrapped the JSON in a ```json fenced block. extractJson must strip the fence and parsing must succeed.

name: wrong-types
description: LLM emitted bare numbers where strings are expected (e.g. quantity: 50). Zod coercion must keep the payload usable.

name: html-error-page
description: Provider gateway returned an HTML error page (e.g. 502 from Cloudflare) instead of JSON. Must surface as LLMParseError, not crash.

name: extra-keys
description: LLM invented top-level keys not in the schema. Schema strips unknown keys; payload must apply cleanly.

name: missing-meta
description: LLM returned a patch with no meta block at all on the first call. Patch is applied; meta retains base values.

expected.note: missing fields default to base report values

name: prose-only
description: LLM ignored instructions and returned a prose paragraph instead of JSON.
